ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_BLADE.title: 血刃
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_BLADE.description: 造成 {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Damage}[/green]|{Damage:diff()}} 点伤害。施加 1 层萃血。
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_BLADE.description+: 造成 9 点伤害。施加 1 层萃血。

ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_VEIL.title: Blood Veil
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_VEIL.description: Gain {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Block}[/green]|{Block:diff()}} Block. At low Health, gain 2 additional Block.
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_VEIL.description+: Gain 8 Block. At low Health, gain 2 additional Block.

ENTELECHIA-ROSE_TRAIL.title: 玫影觅迹
ENTELECHIA-ROSE_TRAIL.description: 造成 {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Damage}[/green]|{Damage:diff()}} 点伤害 2 次。施加 {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{BloodHarvestPower}[/green]|{BloodHarvestPower:diff()}} 层萃血。施加 1 层失血。
ENTELECHIA-ROSE_TRAIL.description+: 造成 4 点伤害 2 次。施加 3 层萃血。施加 1 层失血。

ENTELECHIA-DISCONTINUOUS_PULSE.title: Discontinuous Pulse
ENTELECHIA-DISCONTINUOUS_PULSE.descripti: You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to 1 other card from your hand. If you do, draw 2 cards. Regardless, remove 1 Blood Harvest from the first living enemy that has it, then apply {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{BloodlossPower}[/green]|{BloodlossPower:diff()}} Bloodloss.
You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to 1 other card from your hand. If you do, draw 2 cards. Regardless, remove 1 Blood Harvest from the first living enemy that has it, then apply 3 Bloodloss.
DISCONTINUOUS_PULSE.title: Discontinuous Pulse

ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_STRIKE.title: 血击
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_STRIKE.description: Deal {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Damage}[/green]|{Damage:diff()}} damage. At high Health, if the target survives, draw 1 card. At low Health, if the target dies, heal 3 HP.
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_STRIKE.description+: Deal 14 damage. At high Health, if the target survives, draw 1 card. At low Health, if the target dies, heal 3 HP.

ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_SHIELD.title: Blood Shield

ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_SHIELD.description+: Gain 13 Block. At High Health, draw 1 card. At Low Health, gain 1 Energy.

ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_MEND.title: 血愈
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_MEND.description: At high Health, draw {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Cards}[/green]|{Cards:diff()}} cards. At low Health, heal {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Heal}[/green]|{Heal:diff()}} HP and draw {IfUpgraded:cond:=0?1|[green]2[/green]} cards.
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_MEND.description+: At high Health, draw 3 cards. At low Health, heal 7 HP and draw 2 cards.
BLOOD_MEND.title: 血愈
BLOOD_MEND.description: At high Health, draw {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Cards}[/green]|{Cards:diff()}} cards. At low Health, heal {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Heal}[/green]|{Heal:diff()}} HP and draw {IfUpgraded:cond:=0?1|[green]2[/green]} cards.

ENTELECHIA-HEART_BRAND.title: 心烛印记
ENTELECHIA-HEART_BRAND.description: Lose 3 HP. If the target has no Heart Candle, apply Heart Candle equal to {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{HeartCandlePower}[/green]|{HeartCandlePower:diff()}}% of its current HP and gain 1 Energy; otherwise, apply Heart Candle equal to {IfUpgraded:cond:=0?6|[green]9[/green]}% of its current HP. Draw 1 card.
ENTELECHIA-HEART_BRAND.description+: Lose 3 HP. If the target has no Heart Candle, apply Heart Candle equal to 18% of its current HP and gain 1 Energy; otherwise, apply Heart Candle equal to 9% of its current HP. Draw 1 card.

ENTELECHIA-SANGUINE_RITE.description: 对所有敌人施加 {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{BloodHarvestPower}[/green]|{BloodHarvestPower:diff()}} 层萃血和 {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{BloodlossPower}[/green]|{BloodlossPower:diff()}} 层失血。若生命高于 50%，抽 1 张牌；否则，每影响一名存活敌人获得 2 点格挡，最多 6 点。

ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_BORROW.title: 借血
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_BORROW.description: 高血时失去 2 点生命，低血时失去 1 点生命。若支付后生命高于 50%，抽 {IfUpgraded:cond:=1?[green]{Cards}[/green]|{Cards:diff()}} 张牌，若抽到攻击牌则获得 1 点能量；否则，抽 {IfUpgraded:cond:=0?2|[green]3[/green]} 张牌并获得 1 点能量。
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_BORROW.description+: 高血时失去 2 点生命，低血时失去 1 点生命。若支付后生命高于 50%，抽 4 张牌，若抽到攻击牌则获得 1 点能量；否则，抽 3 张牌并获得 1 点能量。

ENTELECHIA-ETERNAL_REPLETE.title: Eternal Repletion
ENTELECHIA-ETERNAL_REPLETE.description: At Low Health, apply 2 Blood Harvest to all living enemies and gain 1 Blood Speed. Gain Eternal Repletion: when Repletion triggers, heal to {IfUpgraded:cond:=0?50|[green]55[/green]}% of maximum HP; empower Ember Bloodline to apply {IfUpgraded:cond:=0?2|[green]3[/green]} Blood Harvest to all living enemies each turn in subsequent combats.
